notes: MIF-006 has Python and Rust spike-buffer surfaces; Go is allocated only for optional network-side router scaffolding and is not a local decode backend.
Event timestamps are bounded to the shared u64 nanosecond domain on Python and Rust/PyO3 surfaces.
Non-isolated local comparison run on a workstation with powersave governor and nontrivial host load; do not treat as a production performance claim.
